title: Unstable SMP Death Sound
description: Plays the Wither spawn sound (Like in the Unstable SMP) when a player dies within a 450-block radius of you
body:
A lightweight Minecraft datapack that plays the **Wither spawn sound**, as heard in the Unstable SMP series, **whenever a player dies**. The sound is played at the death location and can be heard by all players within a 450-block radius. 

This datapack is designed for SMP servers and works without any mods or plugins.
